channel.title: Projects on Hassenfeld
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Hassenfeld

item.title: GrantGo
item.author: chengxue.han654@gmail.com (Hassenfeld)
item.description: GrantGo: Your AI-powered grant assistant. From precise profiling to document pre-review, we provide full-cycle support. Simplify registration, enhance consultation efficiency, and help you skip the guesswork to quickly secure the most suitable grant opportunities.

item.title: Happy Spring Festival 2026
item.author: chengxue.han654@gmail.com (Hassenfeld)
item.description: Light up the wish wall and embrace the new year with fresh hopes and dreams together！

item.title: Happy New Year 2026
item.author: chengxue.han654@gmail.com (Hassenfeld)
item.description: Tap to sparkle! Fireworks bloom to welcome the New Year!
